# HOTFIX d.o.o.

> AI and software consulting firm based in Croatia. We help companies integrate
> AI into real processes, modernize codebases, and deliver software more
> reliably. Hands-on engineering plus consulting — not generic AI narratives.

HOTFIX d.o.o. is a Croatian limited liability company (d.o.o.) operating
bilingually in Croatian and English, serving clients across Croatia and the
broader EU. Engagements are project-based or retainer, scoped after a discovery
conversation. Working hours Mon–Fri, 09:00–17:00 CET.

## What we do

- **AI consulting & adoption** — assess where AI genuinely shortens the work,
  set up guardrails, run evaluations, and integrate into production. Includes
  Claude Code and Codex enablement, multi-agent workflows when they make sense,
  and clear rules for review, security, and ownership.
- **Software architecture & delivery process** — architecture review, technical
  planning, CI/CD, testing, observability, release process, and codebase
  modernization without stopping development.
- **Engineering productivity** — repository templates, automations, Claude Code
  skills, AI-assisted development standards, and runbooks that reduce friction
  without lowering quality.
- **Privacy, quality, production readiness** — privacy-by-design, GDPR-aligned
  data handling, threat modeling, automated tests, observability, and
  operational runbooks.
- **Custom software development** — web (TypeScript, React, Next.js), backend
  (.NET, Go, Python, Node.js), mobile (Kotlin, KMM, Swift), APIs, integrations,
  internal tools, automations, and modernization of legacy systems.

## Who we work with

- CTOs, VPs of Engineering, and engineering leads at small-to-mid product
  companies and scale-ups.
- Founders and CEOs of small product companies who need a senior technical
  partner who can both decide and build.
- Product and engineering teams adopting AI-assisted development without losing
  control of the codebase.
- Compliance-conscious teams that need GDPR-aligned data handling and
  production readiness.

## What we are not

- We do not sell generic "AI transformation" narratives.
- We do not push a stack for marketing reasons.
- We do not replace legal advice on GDPR — we cover the technical side.
- We do not work on greenfield-only ideas without a real team or problem.

## Engagement model

- Every engagement is scoped after a discovery conversation. There is no public
  price list — see /pricing.md for the engagement model.
- Bilingual delivery in Croatian (HR) and English (EN).
- Primary stack expertise: .NET, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Go, Python,
  Kotlin, Swift, KMM, plus AI tooling (Claude Code, Codex, MCP, RAG,
  multi-agent systems).
- Lead-gen surface: book a call or send an inquiry from the website.

## Founder

- **Josip Budalić** — founder, software architect, and AI-assisted development
  consultant. Background in .NET, React/TypeScript, Go, Kotlin/KMM, Swift,
  Python, and modern AI coding workflows.

## Contact

- Email: ops@hotfix-doo.com
- Website: https://www.hotfix-doo.com
- Hours: Mon–Fri, 09:00–17:00 CET

## Blog topics

Practical notes from AI-assisted development, Claude Code workflows,
multi-agent systems, software delivery, specifications, automation, and
engineering processes. Articles are written by people who actually build and
maintain software in production.

Selected articles:

- Bringing AI into the development process without losing control
- Software modernization without stopping development
- Claude Code subagents for more objective code reviews
- Claude Code skills: standardizing AI workflows in a team
- Spec-driven development and AI: faster development without losing control
- The big AI context trap: lessons from practice
- NotebookLM workflow for faster learning without a pile of tabs
- How I automate GitHub issue tracking with OpenClaw
